CRUD operations for ConnectedAccountsModule records via csdk CLI

## Usage

```bash

csdk connected-accounts-module create --databaseId <value> --tableName <value> --tableNameTrgmSimilarity <value> --searchScore <value> [--schemaId <value>] [--privateSchemaId <value>] [--tableId <value>] [--ownerTableId <value>]

csdk connected-accounts-module delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all connectedAccountsModule records

csdk connected-accounts-module list
